label: NAV Summary

knownIssues: accounts-data-context.tsx imports ACCOUNTS from lib/mocks/fixtures/trading-data for org→venue mapping (not balance data) and MOCK_SAFTS for SAFT demo records. These are intentional fixture uses but should be moved to lib/constants/ or lib/config/ in a future cleanup pass.
